name: XYZ Molecule Viewer
description: A draft built-in plugin for previewing xyz, extxyz, cif, and pdb molecular structures with 3Dmol.js.

modelHints.text: XYZ Molecule Viewer is enabled. When outputting a molecular structure, you must call remote_codex_render_molecule; do not output plain xyz, pdb, cif, or extxyz text. Do not invent coordinates unless asked for an example.
